name: Alliance SMS Script Factory
principle: SMS teaches the factory what deterministic scripts are missing; approved scripts answer future messages.
unknown_intent_reply: Let me check on this and get back with you soon.

scripts.description: Normalizes inbound SMS, checks known deterministic intents, and routes unknown text into the intake gap flow.
Replies with the holding message and queues the original SMS for Script Factory review.
scripts.response: Let me check on this and get back with you soon.

scripts.description: Stores unmatched inbound SMS with normalized text, reason, suggested script id, and review status.
Responds to casual greetings with a short personalized menu of common SMS actions.
Acknowledges a known section that is not functional yet and records interest for notification when ready.
scripts.response: Ok, we're still working on that section. We'll let you know once it is ready.

scripts.description: Groups repeated intake gaps into candidate script families.
Turns a repeated gap cluster into a proposed deterministic SMS script contract.
Requires a human or governed operator decision before a candidate script can answer users automatically.
Promotes an approved candidate into this registry and makes it available to the SMS router.
Answers questions about the next Alliance event after the calendar leg exists.
Sends a secure profile or edit-profile link for a registered phone.
Lists groups available to the registered person after the groups leg exists.
Registers a person for an event after calendar and event registration records exist.
